title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Nucleus Software International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Nucleus Software International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Nucleus Software International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
